sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92299" key="r(e/on2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥέον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n92299.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥῆον</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:347" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.347</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:5:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.5</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:9:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.2</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:11:59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.11.59</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
